hooks.command: if [ -f .claude/workflow.config.yaml ]; then echo 'dev-workflow: configurado (.claude/workflow.config.yaml). Skills: /task, /code-review-task, /docs-sync.'; elif [ -d .git ]; then echo 'dev-workflow: instalado mas NAO configurado neste projeto — rode /setup-project para gerar .claude/workflow.config.yaml.'; fi
